full_text: Jofra Archer to Head, Bowled!! short_text: Moeen Ali to Warner, Bowled!! England needed this, Moeen needed this - the two openers were running away with the contes
full_text: Moeen Ali to Warner, Bowled!! England needed this, Moeen needed this - the two openers were running away with the contest - nicely bowled by Moeen, dragged the length back, offered no pace at all and the ball stayed devilishly low - Warner had backed away on the cut, he has to wait and wait, that forces the mistake as he looked to go hard on the cut, the ball sneaks under and crashes into the middle-stump. A superb cameo comes to an end and Warner walks off to a good round of applause from the Aussie supporters.
